name: Custom Security Rules
description: Custom security rules that can be extended by users

rules.name: Hardcoded IP Address
rules.description: Hardcoded localhost or IP address - may indicate development code
rules.remediation: Use configuration files or environment variables for server addresses

rules.name: TODO/FIXME in Production Code
rules.description: Unresolved TODO, FIXME, or HACK comment found in code
rules.remediation: Address or remove TODO/FIXME/HACK comments before production deployment

rules.name: Weak Regex Pattern (ReDoS)
rules.description: Potentially vulnerable regex pattern that could cause ReDoS (Regular Expression Denial of Service)
rules.remediation: Review and optimize regex patterns to avoid catastrophic backtracking

rules.name: Raw Database Query
rules.description: Raw SQL query execution detected - potential SQL injection risk
rules.remediation: Use ORM query builders or parameterized queries instead of raw SQL

rules.name: Basic Authentication Detected
rules.description: Basic authentication used - credentials sent in plaintext (base64 encoded)
rules.remediation: Use OAuth 2.0, JWT, or API keys with TLS instead of Basic Authentication

rules.name: Weak Random Number Generator
rules.description: Use of weak random number generator for security-sensitive operations
rules.remediation: Use cryptographically secure random generators: crypto.randomBytes(), random_int(), secrets module

rules.name: Print/echo Debug Statement
rules.description: Debug print statement found - may leak information in production
rules.remediation: Remove debug statements before production deployment or use proper logging
